title: CMS INDUSLAW, Khaitan act on Scapia $63 million Series C fundraise
description: Scapia Technology Private Limited has raised $63 million from a Series C fundraise led by General Catalyst, with participation from existing investors Peak XV Partners and Z47.CMS INDUSLAW advised Scapia on this fundraise.The transaction was led by Winnie Shekhar (Partner), with support of Shantanu Singh (Partner), Chandresh Goyal (Senior Associate) and Arnab Chakraborty (Associate).The Firm had advised Scapia on their previous fundraise as well.Winnie Shekhar, Shantanu SinghKhaitan & Co adv
